summary: Iteration 108: Phase B-D Enterprise Hospitality Platform - Backend 52/52 tests PASSED (100%). All new features verified: Cart Label Generator (72pt BEO#, 60pt ROOM, RED/BLUE color codes), Oven Firing Poster (10-step Chef's Logic timeline), Supplier Shortage Detection (24hr violations, FOH callouts), Allergen Recipe Customization (16 guests with restrictions), Equipment Concierge Tickets, Job Share (schedule, benefits, marketplace), Echo Layout (15 floor plans across 3 event types), Events Extras (25 items, 7 categories), Pricing Adjustments, Customer Complaints with EchoAi compensation.
critical_code_review_comments: Cart Label Generator correctly uses 72pt font for BEO# and 60pt for ROOM with RED (HOT) / BLUE (COLD) color codes
Firing Poster generates 10-step Chef's Logic timeline with proper oven assignments and bottleneck warnings
Supplier Shortage Detection identifies grouper shortage with 24hr violation and skirt steak shortage with alternative vendor
Allergen Customization generates per-guest modifications for 16 guests with shellfish, gluten, coconut, pork, mushroom restrictions
Equipment Concierge Tickets notify Chef/Engineering/Banquet Manager and recalculate firing sequence
Job Share provides weekly schedule with staffing needs, 4 benefit categories, and job marketplace
Echo Layout provides 15 floor plans (5 per event type: wedding, holiday_gala, corporate_conference)
Events Extras catalog has 25 items across 7 categories with 26% service charge on quotes
Pricing Adjustments support discount/markup with approval tracking
Customer Complaints include EchoAi compensation suggestions based on severity and repeat complaint escalation
seed_data_creation: 6 Pier Sixty-Six BEOs verified: #7186 (Caribbean Evenings Dinner Buffet), #7626 (Setup), #7628 (Bar On Consumption), #7167 (Breakfast Buffet), #7187 (General Session), #7169 (BBQ Lunch)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 108 tested Phase B-D features. All endpoints working: POST /api/kitchen-production/cart-labels (72pt BEO#, 60pt ROOM, RED/BLUE color codes, daily count checks), POST /api/kitchen-production/firing-poster (10-step Chef's Logic, oven assignments, 24x36 poster format), POST /api/kitchen-production/supplier-shortage/detect (24hr violations, FOH/BOH callouts), POST /api/kitchen-production/allergen-customize (per-guest modifications, kitchen instructions), POST /api/kitchen-production/concierge/equipment-ticket (notifications, firing recalculation), GET /api/operations/job-share/schedule (staffing needs per day), GET /api/operations/job-share/benefits (4 categories), GET /api/operations/job-share/marketplace (open shifts, permanent openings), GET /api/operations/layout/floor-plans (15 plans across 3 event types), POST /api/operations/layout/generate (attach to BEO), GET /api/operations/events/extras (25 items, 7 categories), POST /api/operations/events/extras/quote (26% service charge), POST /api/operations/events/pricing/adjust (discount/markup), POST /api/operations/events/complaint (EchoAi compensation).
